ham.subject: Update: Company Leave Policy Effective from 1st May
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We hope you are doing well. Please be informed that the company leave policy has been updated effective 1st May 2024. The key changes are:
- The annual leave entitlement has increased to 25 days.
- The carry-forward limit is now 15 days.
- Sick leave can be availed up to 12 days per year.

Please review the attached policy document for details.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
HR Department

spam.subject: Urgent: Your FedEx/DHL Delivery Fee Pending
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your shipment with tracking number XYZ123 has not been delivered due to an outstanding delivery fee of INR 250. To avoid cancellation, please pay the fee within 48 hours by clicking the link below:
<URL>

If you have already paid, kindly ignore this email.

Thank you,
FedEx Customer Support
